name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill or a material change to an existing skill.
title: "feat(skill): "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Capability

What capability should the skill provide?

## When to use it

What task shape should activate this skill?

## Existing coverage

Which existing skill or taxonomy cell is closest?

## Proposed fit

- Taxonomy location:
- Tier:
- Expected dependencies:

## Validation plan

How should the skill be evaluated before it ships?

## Notes

New skills should follow `.github/CONTRIBUTING.md`, update `skills/REGISTRY.md`, and add
any needed composition edge in `docs/design/06-dependency-graph.md`.
